feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Project scheduling in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any proposed solution or workaround solutions for project scheduling in cloud?
In HANA, we can schedule via T-code CJ20N.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Maintain Export PDF for Balance Sheet/Income Statement
entry.content: Can I add a logo from the PDF export results to the Balance Sheet/Income Statement?

entry.title: Maintain the fields on the correspondence form
entry.content: Our client has a request to add a spelled field ‘Terbilang’ (changing the number 'AmountInTransactionCurrency' to text) using Indonesian on the form. whereas in the FormCalc code provided by Adobe LiveCycle only the WordNum syntax is changing the number 'AmountInTransactionCurrency' into English text

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud and Embedded PP/DS
entry.content:
Hello, what is the actual situation with the subj?

Based on this comment, PP/DS wasn't a part of S/4HANA Public Cloud, but many things have changed since then.

entry.title: Unable to see the negative values for the Reversed Material
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings of the day!!

In the application "Material document Overview", all the postings of materials are in positive values which may be goods receipts, goods postings and goods reversals. 

Receipts of goods, good issues and Reversals can be identified only by the movement type. There is no identification of negative sign for reversals as there is a identification in MB51 in ECC version.

Are there any hidden settings to turn on the signs for the quantity's that are reversed (means for 262 movements) if not please help with the suitable application which has signs for the Reversed material.

 

Regards,

Yaswanth. 

MM Purchasing 

MM Inventory Management

entry.title: DRC - No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

eDocument (General) for DRC in Public Cloud: Handle Incoming Messages
When I run it, I get an error as follows. How can I solve this?
No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL found in the EDOMSGTYPEPULL view
Thanks everyone

entry.title: Representative Key in CDS
entry.content: We'd like to know choose different representative key in  custom CDS will have what impact.

entry.title: Outbound Service Consumption Model Error - Failed to change codepage (OData V4)
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I was trying to create outbound service call for Bank API from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

I have followed the step mentioned in https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html to create an Outbound Service Call via Service Consumption Model in Eclipse. 

I was able to successfully create Outbound Service and Communication Scenario for the same API.

I am facing this error: Error while parsing an XML stream: 'failed to change codepage', while trying to upload the EDMX Metadata file for the API of OData V4 type.

I tried the same for OData V2 (Business Partner) and it's working fine ✅.

Kindly assist me to resolve this error.

Thanks,
Akil

entry.title: Issue with Creating Service Consumption Model for Outbound Service using OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

When attempting to upload the API specification (EDMX file) while creating the service consumption model, we encounter the following error:
Error while parsing an XML stream: 'failed to change codepage'.
This issue occurs exclusively with APIs of OData V4 type. In contrast, the service consumption model creation works without issues for APIs of OData V2 type.

Detailed Error Context:

Tutorial Followed:  https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html 
API Used: Standard Bank API of S/4HANA public cloud version ( Bank API outbound)
Error Message: Error while parsing an XML stream: 'failed to change codepage'
OData Version: Issue specifically with OData V4 type; no issues with OData V2 type.

Steps to Reproduce:

Follow the steps in the tutorial to create a service consumption model.
Upload the OData V4 API specification (EDMX file).
Encounter the error during the upload process.

Request your assistance on this.

entry.title: How To create collection group in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We are getting errors in the App Manage Collection Groups "View/table is switched to display mode only". We are not able to create collection group. How to create the collection group.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Invoice Cleared in Manage Customer Line item but not in process flow.
entry.content:
Hi,

When clearing a customer invoice there was a small amount left that should have been cleared (0.1 USD). The invoice was then displayed as cleared even if the full amount not was cleared. When looking into the processflow the journal entry did not have the status cleared. This then creates confusion for the AR clerk that want to make sure that the cleared items are fully cleared in the system.

Why is the document showing as cleared, even if it is not cleared and is there any settings to prevent this?

All the best,

Adam

entry.title: How to extend Ledger 0E?
entry.content:
We are trying to define extension ledger ‘0E’ for commitments, but there is no option.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Batch filling Project timesheet for team
entry.content:
Hi sap,

I want to know it there an app can let user fill timesheet for all team members in one project or wbs? We have a role responsible for fill time resource for team member.

If exists this app, which role or Business Catalogs can let him has permission?

entry.title: How can I use the CICX billing type
entry.content:
How I can create a Pro Forma invoice for a 3rd Party process using CIX5 billing type?

 

I have successfully registered a billing type “CIX1” voucher using SOAP.
But CICX has little information, I need API information and Body.

entry.title: BADI to determine Sales Order header data using sales order item in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement where I need to determine some of the Sales Order header standard fields based on line items added by user. As of now we have checked multiple BADI's ( SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD, SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_TAX etc. ) but none of the BADI has both header and Item data and provide Sales Order Header as changing parameter. 

We want to use both Create Sales Order and Manage Sales Order apps as per business requirement.

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2402

Thanks & Regards,

Aman Mittal

@Julio_B  @shaofeng_qing

entry.title: Creating Down Payment request without reference to any specific PO Items
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Question:

While creating a down payment request with reference to the Purchase order we are not able to proceed without providing the PO item level details even though it is not a mandatory field to fill in the app "Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests".

Our customer wanted to create a Down Payment Request at PO level but not mandatorily at item level.

Please find the attached image for reference.

Please guide us if there is any feasibility to do so in the same app- "Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests".

Thank you.

Amar Modanwal

entry.title: Maintaining Multiple GR/IR GL Account
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

QUESTION:

We wanted to assign Multiple GR/IR GL Account for different Material Categories but In the Current situation all the adjustment with respect to GR/IR is done through only one "GL Account- 21120000."sap finance

However, if we go to "Automatic Account Determination" Configs we are not able to do so, and the Valuation class option is also greyed out in the system

Please find the attached images for reference and guide us if there is any feasibility to do so in the system.

Thank You

Amar Modanwal

entry.title: Public Cloud Profitability Report
entry.content:
Hi Cloud Experts,

I want to report my profitability. I wanna see a report like a KE24. We have "Market Segments - Actual" and "P&L". But these reports give me all my accounts. We need only profit and costs report with characteristics

 

Thank you

entry.title: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory Price" data in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have search literally everywhere for "Inventory Price" of a material, in other words, the actual price we calculate with CKMLCP at the end of a period. However, could not find it. I have used both https://api.sap.com/ with "Customer Data Browser" app and also "Eclipse" program but no luck so far.

Does anyone know if there is a CDS for that data? We need it for some development.

These are the data we are searching for:

Best Regards.

entry.title: #COE #BA01 Customer Project Billing Item Detail change logs
entry.content:
Hello,

How can we access the change logs related to billing item details within a Customer Project?

Specifically Billing Partner changes, or changes to Billing Due Dates or amounts. We need to be able to audit/analyze who made a change.

These do not appear to be covered in the Customer Project logs accessed thru Display Change Documents.

Best,

Ryan
